referenceSource.note: lm(y ~ x1 + x2) where x2=2*x1: R drops collinear variable (coefficient=NA). Python may raise LinAlgError.

description: Multiple regression with perfect multicollinearity (x2 = 2*x1). Singular design matrix → should error gracefully, not crash.

datasets.name: perfect_collinearity
datasets.source: synthetic: x2 is exact linear function of x1

cases.description: Multiple regression with perfect collinearity (should raise error, not crash)
cases.rCode: lm(y ~ x1 + x2)  # x2 = 2*x1, singular matrix
